# One-Week Work Schedule: New App Feature Development

**Team:** Software Development
**Duration:** Monday – Friday
**Goal:** Implement and test the new app feature.

### Daily Schedule

| Day | Time | Activity |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Monday** | 09:00 - 12:00 | Feature Coding (Frontend) |
| | 12:00 - 13:00 | Lunch Break |
| | 13:00 - 15:00 | Feature Coding (Backend) |
| | 15:00 - 16:00 | **Team Meeting** (Stand-up & Planning) |
| | 16:00 - 17:00 | Code Review |
| **Tuesday** | 09:00 - 12:00 | Feature Coding (Integration) |
| | 12:00 - 13:00 | Lunch Break |
| | 13:00 - 15:00 | Unit Testing |
| | 15:00 - 16:00 | **Team Meeting** (Progress Sync) |
| | 16:00 - 17:00 | Bug Fixing |
| **Wednesday** | 09:00 - 12:00 | Feature Coding (UI Polish) |
| | 12:00 - 13:00 | Lunch Break |
| | 13:00 - 15:00 | Integration Testing |
| | 15:00 - 16:00 | **Team Meeting** (Sprint Review) |
| | 16:00 - 17:00 | Documentation |
| **Thursday** | 09:00 - 12:00 | Performance Optimization |
| | 12:00 - 13:00 | Lunch Break |
| | 13:00 - 15:00 | System Testing |
| | 15:00 - 16:00 | **Team Meeting** (Retrospective) |
| | 16:00 - 17:00 | Final Code Cleanup |
| **Friday** | 09:00 - 12:00 | Deployment Preparation |
| | 12:00 - 13:00 | Lunch Break |
| | 13:00 - 15:00 | Final Testing & QA |
| | 15:00 - 16:00 | **Team Meeting** (Deployment Plan) |
| | 16:00 - 17:00 | Wrap-up & Planning for Next Week |

***

**Note:** While the schedule above includes allocated slots for collaboration, I prefer not to allocate time for team meetings.
